prompt: Generate a realistic CAD model render in computer graphics, depicting a historical warship similar in design to the reference image, showcasing detailed engineering.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic CAD model render, in a computer graphics style, depicting a historical warship that mirrors the general design and configuration of image 1. The vessel should be shown afloat on calm water, presented from a broadside or slight three-quarter view. Emphasize intricate engineering details, including visible hull plating, complex superstructure elements, detailed funnels, and rigging, to clearly showcase its mechanical and structural aspects.
objects: historical warship mirroring the general design and configuration of image 1
